display.purpose: Hero h1 only; one per page.

body.purpose: Section lead copy and primary paragraphs. Cap line length 65 to 75ch.

label.purpose: Eyebrow labels above headlines. Uppercase only when structural.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default exponential ease-out for state transitions.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Hover/tint shifts on buttons and links.

motion.name: duration-base
motion.purpose: Focus shifts and panel state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Hero and section primary CTA on warm linen surfaces.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #244f37; color: #f7f5ef; padding: 0.625rem 1.25rem; border: none; border-radius: 0.375rem; font: 600 0.9375rem/1.2 system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #171b19; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #244f37; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action paired with the Primary Button. Never a third button.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: #171b19; padding: 0.625rem 1.25rem; border: 1px solid rgba(24, 33, 28, 0.20); border-radius: 0.375rem; font: 600 0.9375rem/1.2 system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #e8e2d4; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #244f37; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Eyebrow Pill
components.description: Phase-signaling pill above hero and section headlines.
components.html: Now in active development · prototype Aug 2026
components.css: .ds-eyebrow-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: rgba(36, 79, 55, 0.10); color: #244f37; padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 9999px; font: 500 0.875rem/1.3 system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; } .ds-eyebrow-pill .ds-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #244f37; }

components.name: Feature Card
components.description: Three-up feature card with icon, title, body, and bulleted highlights.
components.html:
Crop scans & imaging

Field Capture — phone camera and bulk upload — is the first capture method we are building.
components.css: .ds-feature-card { background: #f7f5ef; color: #18211c; padding: 1.75rem; border-radius: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid rgba(24, 33, 28, 0.08); display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.75rem; } .ds-feature-icon { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 2.5rem; height: 2.5rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: rgba(36, 79, 55, 0.10); color: #244f37; } .ds-feature-title { font: 600 1.125rem/1.3 system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; color: #171b19; margin: 0; } .ds-feature-body { font: 400 0.9375rem/1.6 system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; color: rgba(24, 33, 28, 0.70); margin: 0; }

components.name: Roadmap Status Badge
components.description: Roadmap row status: shipped (success), in progress (accent), planned (secondary), exploring (muted).
components.css: .ds-status-accent { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: rgba(178, 107, 44, 0.15); color: #b26b2c; padding: 0.125rem 0.625rem; border-radius: 9999px; font: 600 0.75rem/1.3 system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.02em; }

narrative.overview: CropAutonomy.com is the public face of the shared gaia-field design system. Warm linen surfaces, deep agricultural green primary, burnt-field amber accent, near-black ink for type. The palette is grounded in soil, leaf, and equipment, not in screen-default neutrals. The page reads like quiet operational infrastructure that happens to be public-facing.
keyCharacteristics: Warm linen base (linen-100 #f7f5ef), not stark white
Deep field green primary, used sparingly on key CTAs and eyebrow accents
Generous section spacing, restrained hierarchy, never a card grid for its own sake
One dark surface per page (the CTA section on shell-deep), used as a punctuation mark
System type stack; no decorative or display font dependencies

rules.name: The One Dark Surface Rule
rules.body: Exactly one shell-deep section per page (the CTA). Two dark sections turn the page into a magazine; the landing is operational infrastructure, not a campaign.

rules.name: The Quiet Accent Rule
rules.body: Burnt-field amber and field-green-deep are state and brand. Neither appears in body copy, decorative dividers, or icon strokes for their own sake.

rules.name: The One Display Rule
rules.body: Exactly one display-weight headline per page (the hero). Subsequent headings drop to Headline scale.

rules.name: The Flat Surface Rule
rules.body: Surfaces do not lift. If you reach for box-shadow, you are probably trying to compensate for a layout that is not working. Fix the layout instead.

dos: Do keep the page on warm linen-100/linen-200 and reserve shell-deep for the single CTA per page.
Do use the eyebrow pill to set phase honestly on every page.
Do pair every CTA with an outline secondary action, never a third button.
Do use real working-farm photography in natural light, full-bleed in containers with rounded-xl.
Do describe Field Capture in future tense and roadmap framing.
Do cap body copy at 65 to 75ch.
Do size touch targets for gloved or one-handed phone use.
Do route every state with shape, label, or icon redundancy alongside color.
donts: Don't use the hero-metric template (big number, small label, supporting stats, gradient accent).
Don't use identical card grids beyond what Features and Audiences already commit to.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored stripe.
Don't apply background-clip: text with a gradient on any heading.
Don't use glassmorphism, backdrop-blur, or frosted-card effects.
Don't introduce playful consumer visuals, soft startup styling, or editorial layouts.
Don't make present-tense claims for Field Capture before it ships.
Don't frame CropAutonomy as a mobile-first phone scouting app.
Don't use em dashes in body copy.
